positive: A stylized, whimsical scene featuring a crescent moon cradling a bouquet of bioluminescent wildflowers and delicate fireflies. The composition should be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, utilizing strong silhouette elements against a gradient deep indigo and cosmic purple background. The style should be a modern, vector-art inspired illustration with clean linework and flat color blocking, suitable for a bold apparel print. Include minimal cosmic dust trails and subtle geometric celestial patterns. Highly detailed, high contrast, ethereal, vibrant.
